'''Drolan Plasteel''' was a small company that manufactured archaic [[Plasteel/Legends|plasteel]] weapons.<ref name="NEGWT" /> It was named after its founder and chief designer, [[Malia Drolan]], who was known to scour the galaxy for inspiration. The company was most well-known for its [[Repeating crossbow|P-71 repeating crossbow]], which was based on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]]<ref name="NEGWT" />, as well as for its [[QuickShot]] [[wrist-caster]]. They were also responsible for producing the [[TYI flex-armor]].
